message:
🐛 Fix false degraded (yellow) agent status from empty kagenti responses (#2159)

Empty kAgent responses are normal when kAgent CRDs aren't installed.
Treating them as data errors falsely triggers the degraded state,
turning the agent pill yellow. Report success instead since the
fetch itself succeeded — the data is legitimately empty.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
